_doc: Curated frames, +1 length-matched content swaps. {fw}/{Fw}=function word (premise only); {cw}=content word (premise AND hyp). base/fn = predicted NLI label (0 ent,1 neu,2 con). pairs=[out,in]; build.py drops any pair failing freq(b,c)+SIGNED-length(d) matching. ONE in-word per (frame,out-word) to avoid double-counting the function arm. Authored + grammar/coherence/flip-checked by the lead agent. content semantic classes: noun_person, noun_thing, verb, adj. NOTE: under faithful matching the clean supply is well below the conjecture's >=200 target -- see matching-report.json and the decisions/open count-vs-matching entry.
